stemHtml: Regarding the measurement reference point for the approach lighting system (ALS): runway 03 has a 150 m displaced threshold while runway 21 does not. What is the difference between the two runways?

options.a: The ALS is measured from the displaced threshold on both runways.
options.b: There is no difference — the ALS is measured from the threshold in both cases.
options.c: On one runway the ALS is measured from the threshold, and on the other it is measured 150 metres before the displaced threshold.
options.d: The ALS is measured from the runway end on both runways.
